ing_lst: 200 g pasta, 1 cup milk, 3 cheese slices, 1 tbsp butter, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp black pepper
cook_steps: 1. Boil pasta.2. Heat milk, butter, and cheese.3. Add pasta and mix.4. Serve warm.

ing_lst: 2 cups rice, 300 g chicken, 1 onion, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tbsp biryani spice, 0.5 tsp salt, 3 cups water
cook_steps: 1. Cook onion and chicken.2. Add spices and rice.3. Add water and cook.4. Serve hot.

ing_lst: 2 eggs, 1 cheese slice, 1 tsp oil, 0.25 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp black pepper
cook_steps: 1. Beat eggs with salt and pepper.2. Pour into a pan.3. Add cheese.4. Fold and serve.

ing_lst: 1 cup flour, 0.5 cup sugar, 0.25 cup cocoa powder, 1 egg, 0.5 cup milk, 0.25 cup oil, 1 tsp baking powder
cook_steps: 1. Mix dry ingredients.2. Add egg, milk, and oil.3. Pour into cake pan.4. Bake until done.
cook_notes: Check carefully before removing from oven.

ing_lst: 2 cups frozen strawberries, 1 cup cream, 0.5 cup condensed milk, 1 tsp vanilla
cook_steps: 1. Blend strawberries.2. Add cream and condensed milk.3. Mix well.4. Freeze until firm.

ing_lst: 1 cucumber, 1 tomato, 0.5 carrot, 0.25 lettuce, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 0.25 tsp salt
cook_steps: 1. Wash vegetables.2. Chop vegetables.3. Add oil, lemon, and salt.4. Mix and serve.

ing_lst: 1 cup rice, 1 cup dal, 3 cups water, 1 tbsp oil, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp salt, 1 tomato
cook_steps:
1. Wash the rice and dal
2. Cook the rice separately 
3. Add tomato, and salt
4. Add dal and water
cook_notes: Adjust water depending on your preference
